bearish_views.bearish_debate_point: Acquisitions (Celestial and XConn) are expected to be initially dilutive to EPS.
bearish_views.exact_sentences_in_the_file: We expect these acquisitions to be initially dilutive by $0.05–$0.06 per quarter, becoming neutral to EPS as revenues ramp meaningfully in F4Q28.

bearish_views.bearish_debate_point: Risk of reversal or significant slowdown in datacenter build-outs.
bearish_views.exact_sentences_in_the_file: Reversal or significant slowdown in datacenter build-outs could jeopardize long-term HDD revenue growth;

bearish_views.bearish_debate_point: Risk of falling behind competitors in next-generation HDD read-channel technology, leading to market share loss.
bearish_views.exact_sentences_in_the_file: falling behind competitors and playing catch-up in next-generation HDD read-channel technology could put market share at risk;

bearish_views.bearish_debate_point: Risk of market share losses due to HDD OEMs adopting a dual-source strategy.
bearish_views.exact_sentences_in_the_file: adoption of a dual-source strategy by HDD OEMs could also cause market share losses;

bearish_views.bearish_debate_point: Risk of muted wired and wireless communications spending from large telco providers impacting communications revenue growth.
bearish_views.exact_sentences_in_the_file: muted wired and wireless communications spending from large telco providers related to 5G could put a lid on communications top line;

bearish_views.bearish_debate_point: Risk of downward revisions in CA VM integration/performance or synergy estimates/timeline, potentially damaging management reputation and leading to estimate revisions.
bearish_views.exact_sentences_in_the_file: downward revisions in overall CA VM integration/performance or in synergy estimates/time line could damage management reputation and cause downward revision to estimates.
